title: Hugo's Colorful Kitchen
synopsis: Baby Hugo explores colorful foods in the kitchen, discovering red strawberries, yellow bananas, green peas, and blue blueberries through joyful sensory play.

pages.text: Hugo loves colors! Hugo loves food! Today Hugo finds red strawberries.

illustration.description: A toddler boy with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes sits in a bright kitchen surrounded by vibrant red paint splatters and drips. Red strawberries are scattered around him in a joyful, finger paint aesthetic with dominant red coloring throughout the scene.
illustration.alt: Hugo discovering red strawberries in a red-splashed kitchen

pages.text: Yellow bananas! Hugo peels yellow bananas. Yellow, yellow, yellow!

illustration.description: Hugo with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes holds yellow bananas while surrounded by splashy yellow paint drips and splatters. The scene is dominated by bright yellow colors in a painterly, sensory visual style.
illustration.alt: Hugo playing with yellow bananas in a yellow-painted scene

pages.text: Green peas roll everywhere! Hugo giggles. Green peas, green peas!

illustration.description: A joyful scene with Hugo, who has straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes, surrounded by rolling green peas and dominant green paint splatters. The finger paint aesthetic shows pure green color exploration with dripping paint effects.
illustration.alt: Hugo laughing as green peas roll around in green paint splashes

pages.text: Blue blueberries! Hugo tastes blue blueberries. Yum! Hugo loves colorful food!

illustration.description: Hugo with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes eating blue blueberries while surrounded by dominant blue paint splatters and drips. The scene shows joyful pure blue color in a splashy painterly style with sensory visual elements.
illustration.alt: Hugo enjoying blue blueberries in a blue-splattered kitchen scene

metadata.illustrationStyle: rainbow colors, splashy painterly, one color dominant per scene, paint splatter drips, sensory visual, joyful pure color, finger paint aesthetic, color exploration

questions.question: What color are the strawberries Hugo finds?
questions.explanation: Strawberries are red! Hugo found red strawberries in the kitchen.

questions.question: What does Hugo do with the yellow bananas?
questions.explanation: Hugo peels the yellow bananas to eat them!

questions.question: What color are the blueberries?
questions.explanation: Blueberries are blue! Hugo tastes the blue blueberries.
